enrichment.short_description: AI-native CRM that unifies LinkedIn, email, WhatsApp, Telegram, and Instagram conversations into one sales pipeline.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Breakcold is an AI-native CRM combining multichannel messaging, pipeline tracking, and AI automation for sales teams.

features.title: Multichannel inbox
features.description: Consolidates email, LinkedIn, WhatsApp, Telegram, and Instagram conversations into one CRM inbox.

features.title: AI CRM actions
features.description: Automates tagging, follow-up drafting, and pipeline stage movement using AI.

features.title: Contact enrichment
features.description: Adds data points to incomplete contact and company records via email and phone waterfall enrichment.

features.title: Meeting recorder
features.description: Records calls and captures transcripts and action items.

features.title: MCP integration
features.description: Lets Claude, ChatGPT, and other AI agents read and update CRM data via Model Context Protocol.

features.title: Chrome extension
features.description: Captures leads and enriches contacts directly from the browser.

pros: Combines email, LinkedIn, WhatsApp, Telegram, and Instagram in one inbox
Native MCP support for AI agents like Claude and ChatGPT
Unlimited contacts, pipelines, and custom objects on its plan
14-day free trial with no credit card required
cons: Single pricing tier ($59/month) rather than multiple plan options
No published free plan
Extra seats and connected accounts cost additional monthly fees
No mobile app mentioned on the site

faqs.question: Does Breakcold offer a free trial?
faqs.answer: Yes, a 14-day free trial is available with no credit card required.

faqs.question: How much does Breakcold cost?
faqs.answer: Breakcold has a single plan priced at $59/month, with extra seats and connected accounts at $10/month each.

faqs.question: Can AI tools like ChatGPT access Breakcold data?
faqs.answer: Yes, Breakcold supports the Model Context Protocol (MCP), allowing Claude, ChatGPT, and other AI agents to read and update CRM records.

faqs.question: What channels does Breakcold support?
faqs.answer: Breakcold syncs email, LinkedIn, WhatsApp, Telegram, and Instagram conversations into a single CRM inbox.

use_cases.title: Multichannel outbound sales
use_cases.description: Manage and follow up on leads across email, LinkedIn, and messaging apps from one pipeline.

use_cases.title: AI-assisted pipeline management
use_cases.description: Use AI to auto-tag leads, draft follow-ups, and move deals through pipeline stages.

features: Unlimited contacts, pipelines, custom objects & fields

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Breakcold?
paragraphs: Breakcold is a CRM built around multichannel conversations, syncing email, LinkedIn, WhatsApp, Telegram, and Instagram into a single pipeline view for sales reps.

It layers AI automation on top of that inbox, using AI CRM actions to enrich contacts, draft follow-ups, and move deals through pipeline stages, and it exposes CRM data to AI agents like Claude and ChatGPT through native MCP support.

enrichment.short_description: AI-powered CRM platform combining sales pipeline management, marketing automation, and customer support in one system.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Salesmate is a CRM unifying sales pipelines, marketing automation, and support with AI-driven calls, emails, and insights.

features.title: Deal pipeline management
features.description: Tracks contacts, companies, and deals through customizable sales pipelines.

features.title: Marketing automation
features.description: Builds audience segments, nurture journeys, and campaigns for lead capture.

features.title: Customer support
features.description: Handles ticket management, SLAs, live chat, and social media support.

features.title: AI co-pilot
features.description: Sandy AI provides call transcriptions, conversation summaries, and automated email composition.

features.title: Built-in communications
features.description: Includes email, text messaging, calling, and a meeting scheduler.

features.title: 700+ integrations
features.description: Connects with Google, Microsoft, Slack, and other business apps.

pros: Combines CRM, marketing automation, and support in one platform
AI co-pilot (Sandy AI) for call transcripts and email drafting
700+ app integrations
15-day free trial with unlimited feature access
cons: No free plan; only a time-limited free trial
Sandy AI features are limited to Pro plan and above
Enterprise pricing is custom/quote-only
Onboarding packages for Enterprise start at an added $1,999

faqs.question: Does Salesmate offer a free trial?
faqs.answer: Yes, a 15-day free trial with unlimited feature access is available.

faqs.question: How much does Salesmate cost?
faqs.answer: Plans start at $23/user/month for Basic, up to $63/user/month for Business, with custom Enterprise pricing.

faqs.question: What is Sandy AI?
faqs.answer: Sandy AI is Salesmate's built-in AI co-pilot, offering call transcription, conversation summaries, and email composition, available from the Pro plan up.

faqs.question: Does Salesmate have mobile apps?
faqs.answer: Yes, Salesmate offers iOS and Android mobile apps and a Chrome extension.

use_cases.title: Unified sales and support
use_cases.description: Manage the full customer lifecycle from lead capture through deal close and post-sale support tickets.

use_cases.title: AI-assisted calling and email
use_cases.description: Use Sandy AI to transcribe calls, summarize conversations, and draft emails.

features: Full email sync with templates and tracking
Dedicated account manager and IP restriction

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Salesmate?
paragraphs: Salesmate is a CRM platform that unifies sales pipeline management, marketing automation, customer support, and built-in communications (email, text, calling) in a single system.

Its Sandy AI co-pilot adds call transcription, conversation summarization, contact insights, and automated email composition, and the platform connects to 700+ third-party apps including Google, Microsoft, and Slack.

enrichment.short_description: Cloud-based sales CRM with Kanban pipelines, contract eSign, and mobile route planning for field and office sales teams.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Pipeline CRM offers Kanban sales pipelines, contract eSign, AI email assistance, and mobile route planning for sales teams.

features.title: Kanban pipeline management
features.description: Visualizes deals and sales stages on drag-and-drop boards.

features.title: Contract management with eSign
features.description: Includes native e-signature support for closing deals.

features.title: AI email assistant
features.description: Helps compose sales emails and bulk email campaigns.

features.title: Mobile app with route planning
features.description: iOS and Android apps include map views and route planning for field sales.

features.title: Data enrichment and email validation
features.description: Add-on services that enrich lead records and validate email addresses.

features.title: Commission tracking
features.description: Tracks sales commissions tied to closed deals.

pros: 14-day free trial of the full Grow plan with no credit card required
Native eSign for contracts built into the CRM
Mobile apps with map views and route planning for field sales
Annual billing saves up to $120/user/year over monthly
cons: Data enrichment and email validation are paid add-ons, not included by default
Lower tiers cap the number of pipelines and active deals
Enterprise plan requires custom/quote pricing
No published free plan

faqs.question: Does Pipeline CRM offer a free trial?
faqs.answer: Yes, a 14-day free trial of the full Grow plan is available with no credit card required.

faqs.question: How much does Pipeline CRM cost?
faqs.answer: Plans range from $25/user/month (Start, annual) to $49/user/month (Grow, annual), with custom Enterprise pricing.

faqs.question: When was Pipeline CRM founded?
faqs.answer: Pipeline CRM was founded in 2006.

faqs.question: Does Pipeline CRM have a mobile app?
faqs.answer: Yes, it offers iOS and Android apps with map views and route planning.

use_cases.title: Field sales route planning
use_cases.description: Use the mobile app's map views to plan visits and track deals on the go.

use_cases.title: Contract-to-close workflows
use_cases.description: Manage deals through pipeline stages and close them with native eSign contracts.
use_cases.audience: Sales teams in professional services and real estate

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Pipeline CRM?
paragraphs: Pipeline CRM is a cloud-based sales management platform built around Kanban-style pipelines, letting sales teams track deals, organize leads, and automate parts of the sales process.

Founded in 2006, it includes native contract eSign, an AI email assistant, and mobile apps with map views and route planning aimed at field sales teams in industries like construction and manufacturing.

enrichment.short_description: Action-focused CRM for small businesses that turns contacts into a single prioritized to-do list of next sales actions.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: OnePageCRM is a small-business sales CRM that turns contacts into a single actionable to-do list with mobile route planning.

features.title: Action Stream
features.description: Centralizes leads into a single next-action to-do list rather than a traditional dashboard.

features.title: Deal tracking with Kanban boards
features.description: Visualizes deals and sales pipeline stages.

features.title: Unlimited contact storage
features.description: Stores unlimited contacts, deals, fields, and tags on every plan.

features.title: Email sync and tracking
features.description: Syncs with Gmail and Outlook and tracks email opens.

features.title: AI route planner
features.description: Mobile app feature that plans sales visit routes.

features.title: Free add-ons
features.description: Includes Sales Dialer, Business Card Scanner, and Lead Clipper at no extra cost.

pros: 21-day free trial with no credit card required
Unlimited contacts, deals, fields, and tags on every tier, including the entry plan
Mobile apps for iOS and Android with an AI route planner
Used in 80+ countries with free companion add-ons like a business card scanner
cons: No free (non-trial) plan
Advanced automation is limited to the Max plan
Prices are listed in euros and exclude VAT for EU customers
Advanced project delivery features are gated behind the Business plan and above

faqs.question: Does OnePageCRM offer a free trial?
faqs.answer: Yes, a 21-day free trial is available with no credit card required.

faqs.question: How much does OnePageCRM cost?
faqs.answer: Plans start at €8.95/user/month (Professional, annual) up to €25.95/user/month (Max, annual).

faqs.question: Does OnePageCRM have a mobile app?
faqs.answer: Yes, it has iOS and Android apps that include an AI route planner.

faqs.question: What is the Action Stream?
faqs.answer: It's OnePageCRM's core feature that turns contacts and leads into a single prioritized list of next actions instead of a standard dashboard.

use_cases.title: Simple next-action selling
use_cases.description: Track leads as a prioritized action list rather than managing a complex dashboard.

use_cases.title: Field visit planning
use_cases.description: Use the mobile app's AI route planner to organize in-person sales visits.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is OnePageCRM?
paragraphs: OnePageCRM is a cloud-based CRM built around an 'Action Stream' that converts leads and contacts into a single prioritized to-do list, rather than a traditional pipeline dashboard.
It targets small businesses and solopreneurs with unlimited contacts on every plan, iOS/Android apps with an AI route planner, and free companion tools like a business card scanner and lead clipper.

enrichment.short_description: All-in-one CRM combining email marketing, sales pipeline, live chat, and helpdesk ticketing for small businesses.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: EngageBay combines email marketing, sales CRM, live chat, and helpdesk ticketing in one affordable platform for small teams.

features.title: Email marketing automation
features.description: Provides autoresponders, sequences, and 1,000+ email templates.

features.title: CRM and deal tracking
features.description: Manages contacts, companies, and sales pipeline stages.

features.title: Live chat and helpdesk
features.description: Includes ticketing, live chat, and an AI chatbot trained on a knowledge base.

features.title: Landing pages and web forms
features.description: Builds lead-capture pages and forms without additional tools.

features.title: Lead scoring
features.description: Scores leads based on engagement to prioritize follow-up.

features.title: 250+ integrations
features.description: Connects with Zapier, Shopify, Stripe, QuickBooks, and other tools.

pros: Free plan for up to 15 team members with no credit card required
Combines marketing, sales, and support in one affordable tool
1,000+ email templates included
Free migration from other platforms
cons: Free plan is limited to 250 contacts
Advanced features like SSO and dedicated account manager require the top Pro tier
Marketing automation is gated to the Growth plan and above
Monthly pricing is notably higher than biennial billing

faqs.question: Does EngageBay have a free plan?
faqs.answer: Yes, a free plan supports up to 15 team members and 250 contacts with no credit card required.

faqs.question: How much does EngageBay cost?
faqs.answer: Paid plans start at $12.74/month (Basic, billed biennially) up to $101.99/month (Pro, billed biennially).

faqs.question: When was EngageBay founded?
faqs.answer: EngageBay was founded in 2017.

faqs.question: Where is EngageBay headquartered?
faqs.answer: EngageBay is headquartered in Wilmington, Delaware.

use_cases.title: All-in-one small business stack
use_cases.description: Replace separate marketing, CRM, and support tools with a single connected platform.

use_cases.title: Lead nurture to support handoff
use_cases.description: Capture leads via landing pages, nurture with automation, then hand off to helpdesk ticketing.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is EngageBay?
paragraphs: EngageBay, founded in 2017 and headquartered in Wilmington, Delaware, is an all-in-one platform combining email marketing automation, sales CRM, live chat, and helpdesk ticketing.
It targets small businesses with a free plan for up to 15 users and 250 contacts, scaling up through paid tiers that add marketing automation, SSO, and custom reporting.

enrichment.short_description: All-in-one CRM combining sales, marketing, and customer support automation for small and mid-sized businesses.
enrichment.headquarters: Hyderabad, India (with offices in the US and Philippines)
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Agile CRM combines sales, marketing automation, and helpdesk tools with a free plan for up to 10 users and paid tiers from $8.99/month.

features.title: 360-degree contact view
features.description: Shows social data, call history, and email interactions in a Facebook-style timeline per contact.

features.title: Web popups and surveys
features.description: Engages site visitors with responsive, personalized popup messages.

features.title: Social media CRM
features.description: Monitors Twitter/X streams and schedules social posts from within the CRM.

features.title: Marketing automation
features.description: Automates email sequences and campaigns alongside sales tracking.

features.title: Helpdesk and telephony
features.description: Includes customer support ticketing and telephony widgets (on paid plans).

pros: Free plan available for up to 10 users with no credit card required
Combines sales, marketing, and helpdesk automation in one tool
99.5% uptime guarantee on paid plans
Entry paid plan starts at $8.99/month
cons: Telephony widgets are restricted on the Starter plan
API call limits scale by plan (500/day on Free up to 25,000/day on Enterprise)
Webhooks are limited to the Enterprise plan
Detailed feature differences between Regular and Enterprise plans are not fully published

faqs.question: Does Agile CRM have a free plan?
faqs.answer: Yes, a free plan is available for up to 10 users with no credit card required.

faqs.question: How much does Agile CRM cost?
faqs.answer: Paid plans start at $8.99/month for the Starter tier, with Regular and Enterprise tiers priced higher.

faqs.question: When was Agile CRM founded?
faqs.answer: Agile CRM launched in 2013.

faqs.question: Where is Agile CRM based?
faqs.answer: Agile CRM is based in Hyderabad, India, with additional offices in the US and Philippines.

use_cases.title: Combined sales and marketing automation
use_cases.description: Run email campaigns and web popups alongside sales pipeline tracking in one tool.

use_cases.title: Social-aware contact management
use_cases.description: View a contact's social activity and call history alongside their deal history.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Agile CRM?
paragraphs: Agile CRM, launched in 2013 and based in Hyderabad, India, is an all-in-one platform combining sales CRM, marketing automation, and customer helpdesk tools for small and mid-sized businesses.
It offers a free plan for up to 10 users, with paid Starter plans from $8.99/month adding features like web popups, social media monitoring, and higher API limits.

enrichment.short_description: Open-source-rooted, AI-powered CRM unifying sales, marketing, and help desk modules for businesses of all sizes.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Vtiger is an AI-powered CRM with sales, marketing, and help desk modules, a free Pilot edition, and open-source roots since 2004.

features.title: Sales playbooks
features.description: Sequences of tasks reps complete at each sales stage to move deals forward.

features.title: Marketing campaigns
features.description: Landing pages, web forms, email campaigns, and personalized nurture sequences.

features.title: Help desk with SLAs
features.description: Automatically prioritizes cases and tracks response/resolution targets.

features.title: AI scoring and forecasting
features.description: Predictive lead and deal scoring, deal forecasting, and sentiment analysis.

features.title: AI email generation
features.description: Generates email drafts, suggested replies, and conversation summaries using CRM context.

features.title: Prompt Builder
features.description: Lets admins create custom prompts based on CRM data for contextual AI answers.

features.title: Open-source core
features.description: Vtiger offers an open-source CRM edition alongside its cloud SaaS product.

pros: Free Pilot edition available alongside a 15-day free trial on paid plans
Open-source edition available in addition to cloud SaaS
AI features (scoring, forecasting, email generation) built into the platform
Used across 110+ countries per the company's own figures
cons: Mixed per-user/per-app licensing model can be complex to configure
Advanced AI edition pricing is separate from standard editions
Some feature comparisons require checking a separate compare-editions page
Booster Pack add-ons are needed to raise limits beyond a plan's defaults

faqs.question: Does Vtiger have a free plan?
faqs.answer: Yes, Vtiger offers a free-forever Pilot edition alongside a 15-day free trial on paid plans.

faqs.question: How much does Vtiger cost?
faqs.answer: The One Growth edition starts at $12/user/month billed annually ($15/month billed monthly), with One Professional and One Enterprise priced higher.

faqs.question: When was Vtiger founded?
faqs.answer: Vtiger's journey started in 2004, with offices in San Francisco and Bangalore.

faqs.question: Is Vtiger open source?
faqs.answer: Yes, Vtiger has open-source origins and still offers an open-source CRM edition alongside its cloud product.

use_cases.title: Unified sales, marketing, and support
use_cases.description: Run sales playbooks, marketing campaigns, and help desk SLAs from one CRM.

use_cases.title: AI-assisted deal management
use_cases.description: Use predictive lead/deal scoring and AI-generated email drafts to prioritize follow-up.

features: Expanded sales, marketing, and help desk features

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Vtiger?
paragraphs: Vtiger is a CRM platform with roots dating to 2004 as an open-source project, now offering both a cloud SaaS product and an open-source CRM edition.

It unifies sales, marketing, and help desk modules with AI features such as predictive lead and deal scoring, deal forecasting, and AI-generated email drafts, and it offers a free Pilot edition alongside paid One Growth, One Professional, and One Enterprise plans.

enrichment.short_description: AI-powered messaging CRM that unifies WhatsApp, Instagram, Telegram, and other chat channels into automated sales pipelines.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Kommo is an AI CRM unifying WhatsApp, Instagram, and Telegram conversations with automated pipelines and 24/7 AI reply.

features.title: Unified chat inbox
features.description: Consolidates conversations from WhatsApp, Instagram, TikTok, Facebook, and Telegram.

features.title: Salesbot automation
features.description: Automates repetitive tasks and answers frequently asked questions.

features.title: AI-powered pipeline management
features.description: Automates lead movement and tracking through the sales pipeline.

features.title: AI scheduling and booking
features.description: Manages appointments with automated scheduling and reminders.

features.title: 24/7 AI reply
features.description: Provides instant automated responses to leads without human involvement.

features.title: Analytics and ROI tracking
features.description: Monitors performance and lead quality, including ad performance tracking.

pros: 14-day free trial with full feature access and 10GB storage, no credit card required
Unified inbox spans WhatsApp, Instagram, TikTok, Facebook, and Telegram
AI reply and AI agents available even on lower tiers (with usage caps)
Mobile apps for iOS and Android
cons: Base plan limits AI agents and channel accounts (1 WhatsApp number, 1 Instagram account)
Enterprise pricing requires a custom quote
Pricing is quoted per user on 6/9/12/24-month billing terms rather than simple monthly billing
No published free (non-trial) plan

faqs.question: Does Kommo offer a free trial?
faqs.answer: Yes, a 14-day free trial with full feature access and 10GB storage is available, with no credit card required.

faqs.question: How much does Kommo cost?
faqs.answer: Plans start at $15/user/month (Base) up to $45/user/month (Pro), with custom Enterprise pricing.

faqs.question: What channels does Kommo support?
faqs.answer: Kommo unifies WhatsApp, Instagram, TikTok, Facebook, and Telegram conversations into one inbox.

faqs.question: Does Kommo have AI features?
faqs.answer: Yes, it includes AI reply suggestions, AI task suggestions, and AI agents that scale in number by plan tier.

use_cases.title: Messaging-first sales
use_cases.description: Manage leads that come in primarily through WhatsApp, Instagram, or Telegram.
use_cases.audience: Sales teams selling via chat apps

use_cases.title: Automated lead response
use_cases.description: Use Salesbot and 24/7 AI reply to instantly respond to incoming leads outside business hours.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Kommo?
paragraphs: Kommo is a CRM built around messaging channels, unifying WhatsApp, Instagram, TikTok, Facebook, and Telegram conversations into a single inbox and sales pipeline.
It layers AI on top of that inbox with Salesbot automation, AI reply suggestions, AI-driven pipeline movement, and appointment scheduling, with the number of usable AI agents scaling by plan tier.

enrichment.short_description: CRM built inside Gmail that unifies email, LinkedIn, WhatsApp, and Instagram communications with pipeline and workflow automation.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: NetHunt CRM lives inside Gmail, unifying email, LinkedIn, and WhatsApp messages with pipeline tracking and MCP-based AI access.

features.title: Gmail/Google Workspace integration
features.description: Runs as a Chrome extension inside Gmail for lead and deal tracking.

features.title: Customizable sales pipeline
features.description: Visualizes and tracks deals through configurable pipeline stages.

features.title: Multi-channel sequences
features.description: Automates outreach across email and messenger channels.

features.title: Sales automation
features.description: Automates workflows, tasks, and contact enrichment.

features.title: MCP Server
features.description: Lets AI tools like ChatGPT and Claude query CRM data conversationally via Model Context Protocol.

features.title: Reporting and forecasting
features.description: Tracks sales performance, revenue forecasting, and activity analysis.

pros: 14-day free trial with full feature access (except custom SMTP)
Deep native integration with Gmail and Google Workspace
MCP Server included even on the entry Basic plan
Startup plan offers 75% off the Business plan for the first year
cons: No free (non-trial) plan
WhatsApp integration and mass email campaigns require the Basic Plus tier or above
Business and Business Plus plan pricing requires an annual quote
API access is limited to the Business plan and above

faqs.question: Does NetHunt CRM offer a free trial?
faqs.answer: Yes, a 14-day trial with full feature access (except custom SMTP) is available.

faqs.question: How much does NetHunt CRM cost?
faqs.answer: Plans start at $24/user/month (Basic, annual) up to $84/user/month (Business Plus, annual quote).

faqs.question: Does NetHunt CRM work inside Gmail?
faqs.answer: Yes, it integrates directly with Gmail and Google Workspace as a Chrome extension.

faqs.question: Can AI tools access NetHunt CRM data?
faqs.answer: Yes, every plan includes an MCP Server that lets AI tools like ChatGPT and Claude query CRM data conversationally.

use_cases.title: Gmail-native sales management
use_cases.description: Track leads, deals, and pipeline stages without leaving the Gmail inbox.
use_cases.audience: Sales teams and founders using Google Workspace

use_cases.title: Multi-channel outreach sequences
use_cases.description: Automate follow-up sequences across email and messenger channels.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is NetHunt CRM?
paragraphs: NetHunt CRM operates as a CRM layer built directly into Gmail via a Chrome extension, unifying email, LinkedIn, WhatsApp, and Instagram communications alongside pipeline and deal tracking.
It adds sales automation, multi-channel sequences, and an MCP Server on every plan tier so AI tools like ChatGPT and Claude can query CRM data conversationally.

enrichment.short_description: Simplified sales CRM with drag-and-drop pipelines, a built-in SmartDialer, and sales analytics for SMB sales teams.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Teamgate is a simplified CRM with drag-and-drop pipelines, a built-in SmartDialer, and sales analytics for SaaS and SMB teams.

features.title: Drag-and-drop pipeline
features.description: Manages leads, contacts, and deals through a visual sales pipeline.

features.title: SmartDialer
features.description: Enables direct calling from within the CRM.

features.title: Email integration
features.description: Syncs with common mail clients for tracking sales communication.

features.title: Sales analytics and dashboards
features.description: Provides reporting and performance dashboards.

features.title: Mobile apps
features.description: iOS and Android apps for managing leads and deals on the go.

pros: Free Starter plan for up to 2 users with 500 contacts
Built-in SmartDialer for calling without a separate tool
20% discount on annual billing for paid plans
14-day free trial available
cons: Free plan caps team size at 2 users and 500 contacts
Advanced analytics, lead scoring, and open API require the top Growth plan
No stated free/paid plan for AI features
Multi-currency support is limited to the Growth plan

faqs.question: Does Teamgate have a free plan?
faqs.answer: Yes, the Starter plan is free for up to 2 users with 500 contacts.

faqs.question: How much does Teamgate cost?
faqs.answer: Paid plans start at $39.90/user/month (Team) up to $59.90/user/month (Growth), with a 20% discount for annual billing.

faqs.question: Does Teamgate offer a free trial?
faqs.answer: Yes, a 14-day free trial is available.

faqs.question: Does Teamgate have a mobile app?
faqs.answer: Yes, it offers iOS and Android apps.

use_cases.title: Simplified pipeline management for SMBs
use_cases.description: Track leads and deals through a drag-and-drop pipeline without enterprise CRM complexity.

use_cases.title: In-CRM calling
use_cases.description: Use the built-in SmartDialer to call leads directly without switching tools.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Teamgate?
paragraphs: Teamgate is a sales CRM positioned as a simpler alternative to feature-heavy enterprise systems, built around drag-and-drop pipeline management and a built-in SmartDialer for calling leads directly from the CRM.
It offers a free Starter plan for up to 2 users, with paid Team and Growth plans adding workflow automation, forecasting, advanced analytics, and an open API.
